scripts.build: vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && for p in en om-mig en/about-me anmeldelser en/reviews nakkesmerter laaste-led smerter-i-bevaegelse spaendingshovedpine genoptraening idraetsskader en/neck-pain en/locked-joints en/musculoskeletal-pain en/tension-headache en/rehabilitation en/sports-injuries; do mkdir -p dist/$p && cp dist/index.html dist/$p/index.html; done
